g.text: Collaborative MassHealth benefits platform — patients & social workers apply together with live screen-share, AI-assisted intake, and encrypted PHI.
Next.js 16 · App Router · React 19 · Redux Toolkit · Tailwind CSS 4 / Radix UI
Signaling: Supabase Realtime Broadcast channel session-webrtc-{sessionId} · STUN: stun.l.google.com:19302
app/api/* route handlers · role guards in lib/auth/*
Vercel AI SDK v6 · agents in lib/agents/* · retrieval in lib/rag/*
→ grounds Benefit Advisor & Chat agent answers
Supabase Postgres/Storage/Realtime · PHI encryption in lib/phi-token/*
Hostinger VPS · Docker Compose behind Traefik · OpenObserve + OpenTelemetry
OpenObserveRumProvider (browser) → RUM intake (page views, errors, replay)
PII auto-redacted: authorization, token, password, ssn, dob → [redacted]
